subject: A goblin wizard standing inside a fiery volcanic fissure, arms raised as molten lava and embers erupt around him
description: A snarling goblin figure with pointed ears and a fanged grin stands in the center of a glowing volcanic fissure. He wears rough leather and a tunic, arms thrown wide as molten lava, sparks, and embers burst upward around him. The background is a wash of orange, red, and yellow flame, with cracked black volcanic rock framing the scene. The composition is dynamic and centered on the goblin's gleeful, manic expression. The card's frame is the standard Magic red-mana red border.
foreground: goblin wizard with arms raised, surrounded by erupting lava and embers
background: volcanic fissure walls with cracked rock and rising flame
